originContent: <body>
translatedContent: <body>

originContent: KOMB: Klipper's Ultimate Brushing Macro
translatedContent: KOMB：Klipper的终极刷头宏

originContent: Welcome to KOMB, the Klipper Optimized Macro for Brushing! This versatile macro streamlines brushing sequences, tailor-made for both bed and gantry mounted brushes. Say goodbye to the hassle of adapting existing macros or creating new ones—now you can harness the full potential of your brush in three dimensions!
translatedContent: 欢迎使用KOMB，Klipper优化的刷头宏！这个多功能宏简化了刷头序列，专为床面和龙门安装的刷头量身定制。告别调整现有宏或创建新宏的麻烦——现在你可以在三维空间中充分发挥刷头的全部潜力！

originContent: Installation:

The cleanest and easiest way to get started with KAMP is to use Moonraker's Update Manager utility. This will allow you to easily install and helps to provide future updates when more features are rolled out!
translatedContent: 开始使用KAMP最简洁、最方便的方法是使用Moonraker的更新管理器工具。这将帮助你轻松安装，并在更多功能发布时提供未来更新！

originContent: 1. `ssh` into your Klipper device and execute the following commands:
translatedContent: 1. 使用`ssh`连接到你的Klipper设备并执行以下命令：

originContent: ```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: cd
translatedContent: cd

originContent: git clone https://github.com/TmRxJD/KOMB
translatedContent: git clone https://github.com/TmRxJD/KOMB

originContent: ln -s ~/KOMB printer_data/config/KOMB
translatedContent: ln -s ~/KOMB printer_data/config/KOMB

originContent: cp ~/KOMB/_KOMB_Variables.cfg ~/printer_data/config/KOMB_Variables.cfg
translatedContent: cp ~/KOMB/_KOMB_Variables.cfg ~/printer_data/config/KOMB_Variables.cfg

originContent: 2. Open your `moonraker.conf` file and add this configuration:
translatedContent: 2. 打开你的 `moonraker.conf` 文件并添加以下配置：

originContent: ```yaml
translatedContent: ```yaml

originContent: [update_manager KOMB]
translatedContent: [update_manager KOMB]

originContent: type: git_repo
translatedContent: type: git_repo

originContent: channel: dev
translatedContent: channel: dev

originContent: path: ~/KOMB
translatedContent: path: ~/KOMB

originContent: origin: https://github.com/TmRxJD/KOMB
translatedContent: origin: https://github.com/TmRxJD/KOMB

originContent: managed_services: klipper
translatedContent: managed_services: klipper

originContent: primary_branch: main
translatedContent: primary_branch: main

originContent: > **Note:**
> Whenever Moonraker configurations are changed, it must be restarted for changes to take effect. If you do not want moonraker to notify you of future updates to KAMP, feel free to skip this.
translatedContent: > 每当更改 Moonraker 配置时，必须重启才能使更改生效。如果您不希望 Moonraker 通知您 KAMP 的未来更新，可以跳过此步骤。

originContent: 3. Optionally, include KOMB_Purge.cfg in your KOMB_Variables.cfg to use the macro there.
translatedContent: 3. 可选地，将 KOMB_Purge.cfg 包含在您的 KOMB_Variables.cfg 中以使用该宏。

originContent: Features and Functionality
translatedContent: 功能与特性

originContent: Flexible Movement: KOMB's default motion sweeps from bottom left corner to right, but you can effortlessly customize movement along various axes and directions. Even use it mid-print depending on your printer and brush placement.
translatedContent: 灵活运动：KOMB 的默认运动是从左下角扫到右侧，但您可以轻松自定义沿各轴和方向的运动。甚至可以根据您的打印机和刷子位置，在打印过程中使用它。

originContent: Diverse Patterns: Currently supports diagonal and circular sweeps (requires gcode_arcs enabled), KOMB's repertoire will soon expand to include more patterns.
translatedContent: 多样图案：目前支持对角线和圆形扫描（需要启用 gcode_arcs），KOMB 的图案库将很快扩展，包含更多模式。

originContent: 3 Dimensional Brushing: Take advantage of the entire area and depth possible of your brush to ensure a cleaner nozzle with more consistent performance, you can be rest assured your nozzle will be clean every time. Nozzle can lower into the brush step by step to allow more nozzle surface area to reach the brush.
translatedContent: 三维刷洗：充分利用刷子的整个区域和深度，确保喷嘴更干净，性能更稳定，您可以放心，每次喷嘴都会保持干净。喷嘴可逐步下降进入刷子，以使更多喷嘴表面接触刷子。

originContent: Use it Mid Print: with KOMB trigger you can use the macro as often as you like over the course of your print, ensuring your nozzle stays clean for the entire duration.
translatedContent: 打印中使用：使用 KOMB 触发器，您可以在打印过程中多次调用宏，确保喷嘴在整个打印期间保持清洁。

originContent: Adjustable Brush Parameters: Tweak variables for precise control
translatedContent: 可调刷子参数：调整变量以实现精确控制

originContent: * Specify your brush location in (X, Y, Z), as well as the size and depth in millimeters
translatedContent: * 指定刷子位置的 (X, Y, Z)，以及大小和深度（单位：毫米）

originContent: * Step size: Distance between diagonal or circular strokes
translatedContent: * 步进大小：对角线或圆形笔画之间的距离

originContent: * Z-step: Descend after each iteration when using repeat. Set to 0 to disable.
translatedContent: * Z 步进：使用重复时每次迭代后下降的距离，设为 0 以禁用

originContent: * Offset: Allows you to start and end movements outside the bounds of the brush, or to stay more confined within use a negative value for this
translatedContent: * 偏移量：允许您在刷子边界之外开始和结束运动，或使用负值限制在内部

originContent: * Repeat count: Specify how many times you want the pattern to iterate
translatedContent: * 重复次数：指定图案迭代的次数

originContent: * Reverse: Enable to repeat the pattern back to the start in reverse before next repetition. If disabled nozzle will travel straight back to start after pattern
translatedContent: * 反向：启用后在下一次重复前反向重复图案回到起点，禁用时喷嘴将直接返回起点

originContent: * Start on Opposite and/or Adjacent side: If opposite side is enabled, nozzle will move from right to left. If adjacent is enabled, nozzle will move along the opposite axis and start on the bottom moving up. If both opposite and adjacent are enabled, nozzle will move from top to bottom.
translatedContent: * 从相对或邻近边开始：启用相对边时喷嘴从右向左移动；启用邻近边时喷嘴沿相反轴线从底部向上移动；两者均启用时喷嘴从上向下移动

originContent: * Variable Speed: Specify speed in mm/s and increase or decrease the speed with each repitition. Also can control travel speed to brush
translatedContent: * 可变速度：指定速度（mm/s），并随着每次重复增加或减少速度，还可以控制移动到刷子时的速度

originContent: * Patterns: Pick between different brushing patters, currently diagonals and circles are supported. (If you still wish to use a classic horizontal pattern you can, just set the brush size on the opposite axis to 0. If you still want it to be able to step set the angle to 0)
translatedContent: * 图案：选择不同的刷洗图案，目前支持对角线和圆形（如果您仍想使用经典的水平图案，只需将相反轴上的刷子大小设为 0；如果仍需步进，将角度设为 0）

originContent: * Angle: specify the angle of the diagonal strokes when using pattern 1, default recommended angle is 45
translatedContent: * 角度：使用图案 1 时指定对角线笔画角度，默认推荐角度为 45

originContent: * Auto Heat: Enable and specify a minimum temperature to allow brushing at and automatically preheat to this temp before brushing
translatedContent: * 自动加热：启用并指定允许刷洗的最低温度，刷洗前自动预热至该温度

originContent: * Auto Home: Automatically home printhead if needed. Will only home if not already.
translatedContent: * 自动回原点：如有需要，自动回原点打印头，仅在未回原点时执行

originContent: * Retraction: Configure retraction before, during, and after brushing.
translatedContent: * 回抽：配置刷洗前、中、后的回抽动作

originContent: * Z Hop: Specify a height to raise nozzle to before moving to brush location and then lowering. Set to 0 to disable.
translatedContent: * Z 跳：指定移动到刷子位置前喷嘴提升的高度，然后下降，设为 0 以禁用

originContent: * Verbose Feedback: Enable verbose console output for comprehensive insights into the brushing process, including axis values, calculations, and positioning points.
translatedContent: * 详细反馈：启用详细控制台输出，提供刷洗过程的轴值、计算和定位点等全面信息

originContent: KOMB Trigger
translatedContent: KOMB 触发器

originContent: You can use KOMB at a specified frequency throughout the print to ensure your nozzle stays clean for the entire duration. Include `KOMB_trigger` in the 'at layer change' section of your slicer configuration to effortlessly trigger the macro at your preferred frequency. Additionally, integrate this macro name into your start print routine to use the macro before starting printing. This feature is not intended for per-object printing and is tailored for use with gantry and frame-mounted brushes. While functional with bed-mounted brushes, cautious use is advised, as attention to your printer's clearances is essential to prevent potential collisions. If utilizing Z hop, the nozzle will ascend before maneuvering over the brush, descend for brushing, and subsequently reascend to its initial height before resuming printing. Configure Z hop settings to provide added clearance during elevation and descent. It is strongly recommended not to set the Z hop value below 2. Additionally, ensure that your axis limits are accurately defined for the macro's effective operation. For guidance on setting axis limits, refer to the guide provided at the end of this readme.
translatedContent: You can use KOMB at a specified frequency throughout the print to ensure your nozzle stays clean for the entire duration. Include `KOMB_trigger` in the 'at layer change' section of your slicer configuration to effortlessly trigger the macro at your preferred frequency. Additionally, integrate this macro name into your start print routine to use the macro before starting printing. This feature is not intended for per-object printing and is tailored for use with gantry and frame-mounted brushes. While functional with bed-mounted brushes, cautious use is advised, as attention to your printer's clearances is essential to prevent potential collisions. If utilizing Z hop, the nozzle will ascend before maneuvering over the brush, descend for brushing, and subsequently reascend to its initial height before resuming printing. Configure Z hop settings to provide added clearance during elevation and descent. It is strongly recommended not to set the Z hop value below 2. Additionally, ensure that your axis limits are accurately defined for the macro's effective operation. For guidance on setting axis limits, refer to the guide provided at the end of this readme.
KOMB 清洗

originContent: KOMB Purge

translatedContent: KOMB 的清洗选项使您能够在进入刷涂序列之前启动受控的材料清洗。此功能在精度至关重要的情况下尤为有用，例如在 Z 偏移校准或其他依赖测量的操作中，无需绘制额外的清洗线。通过使用此功能，您可以轻松定义清洗容器的位置、所需的挤出耗材量以及过渡到刷涂序列之前的等待时间。清洗选项也可以独立于宏的其他部分激活；这为您根据具体需求定制打印过程提供了灵活性。要在开始打印时使用该宏，请在配置中添加“KOMB_purge”。

originContent: KOMB's purging option empowers you with the ability to initiate a controlled material purge before engaging in the brushing sequence. This feature proves especially beneficial when precision matters, such as during Z-offset calibration or other measurement-dependent operations, without the need to draw an extra purge line. By utilizing this feature, you can easily define the location for your purge container, the desired filament extrusion amount, and the wait time before transitioning to the brushing sequence. The purging option can also be activated independently of the rest of the macro; this provides you with the flexibility to tailor your printing process according to your specific requirements. To use the macro in your start print add "KOMB_purge" to your config.

translatedContent: KOMB 的独特性

originContent: KOMB's Distinctiveness

translatedContent: KOMB 设计为无缝适应多样的打印机设置，支持不同的刷子尺寸和位置。不同于传统宏强制喷嘴移动到特定位置，KOMB 根据您的变量生成整个坐标序列，预先调整以保持在打印机限位内。这种主动方法几乎消除了错误风险，确保无论用户错误如何，刷涂都能成功执行。任何超出打印机边界的生成点都会自动调整至范围内，保证顺畅执行。列表一经生成，KOMB 便轻松引导喷嘴通过预定坐标。

originContent: KOMB is designed to seamlessly adapt to diverse printer setups, accommodating varying brush sizes and locations. Unlike traditional macros which brute-force your nozzle to move to specific locations, KOMB generates an entire sequence of coordinates based on your variables, preemptively adjusted to stay within printer limits. This proactive approach nearly eliminates the risk of errors to ensure successful brushing regardless of user error. Any generated points exceeding the printer's boundaries are automatically adjusted to be within, ensuring smooth execution. Once the list is instantly generated, KOMB guides the nozzle through the predetermined coordinates with ease.

translatedContent: 开始使用 KOMB

originContent: Getting Started with KOMB

translatedContent: 确保您的 3D 打印机已安装 Klipper 固件。

originContent: Ensure Klipper firmware is installed on your 3D printer.

translatedContent: 将提供的 KOMB 宏代码 `KOMB.cfg` 集成到您的 Klipper 配置文件 “printer.cfg” 中，和其他宏一同使用。为提升用户友好性，建议将 KOMB 变量保存在单独文件中，并通过 `[include _KOMB_Variables.cfg]` 引入。或者，如果您觉得方便，也可以合并到主配置文件。

originContent: Integrate the supplied KOMB macro code, `KOMB.cfg`, into your Klipper configuration file "printer.cfg", alongside your other macros. To enhance user-friendliness, it's recommended to maintain the KOMB Variables in a separate file and include it using `[include _KOMB_Variables.cfg].` Alternatively, you can merge it with the main configuration if you find that more convenient.

translatedContent: 在 KOMB_Variables 部分指定变量以匹配您的刷涂需求。

originContent: Specify variables in the KOMB_Variables section to match your brushing requirements.

translatedContent: 通过打印机界面确定精确的 XY 刷子位置。以左下角为起点，若需要可调整至 0.1mm 精度。

originContent: Determine exact XY brush position via the printer's UI. Start from the bottom left corner, adjusting down to 0.1mm accuracy if you desire.

translatedContent: 测量刷子尺寸，或通过移动到右上角并从右上位置减去左下位置的 X 和 Y 坐标进行计算。

originContent: Measure brush size or calculate it by moving to the upper right corner and subtracting the lower left position from the upper right on both X and Y axes.
translatedContent: 对 Z 位置重复类似步骤，考虑每次迭代递减喷嘴高度的选项（z_step）。

originContent: Repeat a similar process for the Z position, considering the option to lower the nozzle incrementally with each iteration (z_step).

translatedContent: 保存配置文件并重新加载 Klipper 以应用更改。

originContent: Save the configuration file and reload Klipper to apply changes.

translatedContent: 通过控制台、UI 宏按钮执行 KOMB，或将 `KOMB` 添加到开始打印宏。执行前确保变量配置准确。

originContent: Execute KOMB in the console, via a UI macro button, or add `KOMB` to your start print macro. Ensure variables are configured accurately before execution.

translatedContent: 启用详细输出时，可通过控制台输出监控进度。

originContent: Monitor progress through the console output when verbose output is enabled.

translatedContent: 享受 KOMB 带来的增强刷涂体验！

originContent: Enjoy Enhanced Brushing with KOMB!

translatedContent: 重要说明

originContent: Important Notes

translatedContent: 此宏设计支持多种变量和参数。请根据打印机规格和刷涂需求调整它们。务必理解每个变量的作用及使用方法。

originContent: This macro is designed to work with a range of variables and parameters. Make sure to adjust them according to your printer's specifications and your brushing needs. Make sure you understand what each variable does and how to use it.

translatedContent: 必须确保轴限位设置正确，宏才能正常运行。如不确定，请参阅指南：https://github.com/rootiest/zippy_guides/blob/main/guides/axis_limits.md

originContent: You must ensure that your axis limits are set properly in order for this macro to function correctly. Follow this guide if you are unsure: https://github.com/rootiest/zippy_guides/blob/main/guides/axis_limits.md

translatedContent: 由于宏涉及喷嘴移动，操作时请谨慎，避免刷涂过程中发生碰撞，并确保所有数值正确。建议先在刷子上方低速测试宏，然后再降低到指定位置。

originContent: Since this macro involves moving the printer's nozzle, exercise caution to avoid any collisions during the brushing process and ensure all values are correct. It is recommended to test the macro at a low speed above the brush before lowering it into position.

translatedContent: 请务必关注未来更新及更多图案！

originContent: Be sure to check back in the future for updates and more patterns!
KOMB is a work in progress, and not all variable combinations have been thoroughly tested. Your feedback and contributions to improve the macro are highly appreciated.
translatedContent: KOMB仍在开发中，并非所有变量组合都经过了彻底测试。非常感谢您的反馈和对宏改进的贡献。

originContent: If you encounter any issues, have suggestions for improvements, or wish to contribute to the development of KOMB, please feel free to message me, open an issue or submit a pull request on the GitHub repository.
translatedContent: 如果您遇到任何问题，有改进建议，或希望为KOMB的发展做出贡献，请随时给我留言，提交问题或在GitHub仓库中提交拉取请求。

originContent: Happy KOMBing!
translatedContent: 祝您使用KOMB愉快！
